purpose: Product and dependency update backlog for Unica bundled tools, plugin package dependencies, and release-package inputs.

products.notes: v0.2.48 applied after reviewing current release assets. v0.2.39..v0.2.48 add extension method weaving/checks, bare global common-module call resolution, diagnostics fixes, Windows MCP broker hardening, and IDE completion/template work; Unica continues to consume analyzer behavior only through typed unica.code.* graph/diagnostics gates.

Updated together with rlm-bsl-index to v1.25.0. v1.25.0 keeps index BUILDER_VERSION=14, fixes Cyrillic case folding and session reader cleanup, changes find_path ambiguous-name behavior, and tightens sandbox injection guards; raw RLM helper guidance remains hidden from skills.

v1.25.0 release states index schema and BUILDER_VERSION remain 14, so production index rebuild is not required. Contract gates verify build/info/update, schema tables used by Unica SQL, and generated package launchers.
Updated tools.lock.json to v0.5.1 after reviewing the version command and partial-load/build changes; Unica MCP contract remains typed and unchanged.

package.json/package-lock.json refreshed to 1.61.1. Playwright WebStorage is adopted through web-test getStorage/setStorage/removeStorage/clearStorage helpers after verifying the installed 1.61.1 types expose page.localStorage and page.sessionStorage. Passkeys, APIResponse network details, and video retention modes are not adopted in this batch because the 1C web-test engine has no matching workflow yet.
Source pin is current; local interpreter may still have 6.1.0 until test requirements are installed.
Applied compatible lock-only updates: cc 1.2.64 -> 1.2.65, log 0.4.32 -> 0.4.33, quote 1.0.45 -> 1.0.46, and rustls 0.23.40 -> 0.23.41; direct major updates stay out of this batch.
serde_yaml is deprecated, but replacing the YAML parser is a direct dependency migration rather than a lock refresh; defer to a separate focused PR with v8project.yaml fixture coverage.
ureq 3.3.0 requires Rust 1.85. The repo does not currently publish an MSRV, so the dependency stays on ureq 2.12.1 until Rust 1.85 support is an explicit release-policy decision.
